# Zerotonine project instructions

- Use plain JavaScript with Vite and Three.js.
- Do not introduce React, TypeScript, or extra frameworks.
- Make focused changes only.
- Prefer small helper functions over large rewrites.
- Keep rendering and game logic separated.
- For dice physics, use one mesh and one physics body per die.
- Only non-kept dice should be relaunched.
- Keep UI mobile-friendly and simple.
- Do not rename files unless necessary.
- Explain risky changes briefly before applying them.
